group.name: Always installed - toggle each in the MCM under Features

plugin.name: Elemental Resistance Uncap
plugin.description:
Removes the 75% elemental resistance cap (fPlayerMaxResistance raised to 10000). Fire, frost, shock, magic, and poison resistances now scale to 100% and beyond. At exactly 100% you are immune to that element.
Note: this setting is global, so highly resistant ENEMIES also gain true immunity to their own element - bring a second damage type.
Default: ON. Toggle at runtime in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: Elemental Absorb
plugin.description:
When your resistance to an element exceeds 100%, incoming damage of that type heals you instead: 1% of the damage per point over 100, reaching a full 100% heal at 200% resistance.
Covers hostile spells, weapon enchantments, drains (resisted by Magic Resist), and poisons - each magic effect is checked against the resistance that actually governs it. Only health-damaging effects count, so riders like frost slow cannot inflate the heal.
Applies to you and your current followers. Default: ON.

plugin.name: Physical DR Past 75%
plugin.description:
The armor damage-reduction cap stays at 75% for the world, but for you and your followers DR keeps scaling above it:
DR% = 75 + (armor rating - 750) x 0.0192 99% DR (near-invulnerable) at ~2000 armor rating
The curve below 750 armor is completely unchanged from your load order. Enemies never benefit. Note the armor UI still displays the 75% cap - the extra reduction is real but not shown in menus.
Default: ON. Toggle in MCM > Features.

group.name: Always installed - toggle each in the MCM under Features

plugin.name: Vendor Gold Doubled
plugin.description:
All 13 vendor gold pools (general goods, blacksmiths, apothecaries, inns, spell vendors, street vendors, and all five fence tiers) carry double the gold of your load order's values. Built by reading the winning override in your load order and doubling it, so it stays consistent with Requiem's economy scaling.
This is baked into MRO.esp records and cannot be toggled at runtime.

plugin.name: Carry Weight +150
plugin.description:
You and your followers receive a permanent +150 carry weight ability. Enough to haul a full potion stock and loot without constant inventory management.
Default: ON. Toggle in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: Arrow Recovery 66%
plugin.description:
Arrows recovered from bodies at 66% instead of the vanilla 33%. Archery ammunition stays affordable without being infinite.
Default: ON. Toggle in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: 3-Day Cell Reset
plugin.description:
Cells respawn after 72 hours (7 days if cleared) instead of Requiem's 30 days. Shops restock reliably and the world stays active. Be aware dungeons also repopulate on this schedule.
Default: ON. Toggle in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: Boss Readiness MCM Page
plugin.description:
An MCM page assessing your readiness for Alduin (both fights), Harkon, and Miraak: level, health pool, fire resistance, and how many unresistable Drain Vitality pulses you can survive. Thresholds rise automatically if World Eater's Influence or Immersive Miraak Difficulty are detected.
Purely informational - no gameplay changes.

plugin.name: Enable Mastery System (recommended)
plugin.description:
13 mastery skills tracked via Custom Skills Framework, one per combat/magic/craft skill. Each unlocks when its base skill reaches 100 and advances through normal use of that skill.
Bonuses at full mastery: - One-Handed / Two-Handed / Archery: +50% attack damage - Evasion / Heavy Armor: +300 armor rating - but only while wearing a chest piece of the matching type. Combined with the DR curve this is the path to 99% physical DR. - Destruction / Restoration / Alteration / Conjuration / Illusion: +50 effective skill - Smithing / Alchemy / Enchanting: +25% crafting potency
Mastery cap is adjustable in the MCM (50-200; default 100). Higher caps mean a longer grind to the same maximum bonus. Requires Custom Skills Framework.

plugin.name: Disable Mastery System
plugin.description: No Custom Skills Framework files installed - the 13 mastery skills never appear and no mastery bonuses apply. Every other MRO feature remains active. You can NOT enable mastery later without reinstalling.

plugin.name: Install rebalanced Experience.ini
plugin.description:
Rebalanced XP weights for the Experience mod: more XP from kills (especially groups and above-level enemies), dungeon clears, and quest milestones; less from map discovery. Total leveling speed matches the Faster Leveling preset.
Only choose this if Experience.esp is in your load order. It overwrites your current SKSE/Plugins/Experience.ini.

plugin.name: Skip (keep existing settings)
plugin.description: No Experience.ini installed; your current XP settings are untouched. Choose this if you do not use the Experience mod or prefer your existing tuning.
